description: Multiple fractures in a child are a strong red flag for non-accidental injury.
Skin lesions inconsistent with the reported mechanism of injury.
Burns in a child, especially patterned or immersion burns, are highly suspicious.
Diffuse bruising or haematomas inconsistent with developmental stage.
Traumatic brain injury in a pre-verbal child without a clear accidental mechanism.
Multiple ecchymoses in a child, especially on non-bony prominences.
